text.title: AI-Assisted Specification Writing (Planning Layer) Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs a concrete symptom with sourced root-cause and a concrete fix the author can apply.

antipattern.symptom: Plan drafted while AC still open; rewritten 3 days later.
antipattern.fix: Validator rejects plan whose spec.md status != approved.
Validator runs cycle detection on `depends_on` edges.
